## Problem

What limitation or pain point are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature and expected behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives you evaluated.

## Scope

- Affected component(s): app / agent / docs / release tooling
- Breaking change risk: low / medium / high

## Additional Context

Any screenshots, examples, or related issues.
